   400→    Private Sub ThreadTaskAtlasTool1()
   401→
   402→        Dim buffsize As Integer
   403→        Dim InStream1(1024) As Byte
   404→        Dim temp1 As String = ""
   405→        Dim ToolData As Double
   406→        Dim ToolDecision As String
   407→
   408→        Do
   409→            Try
   410→                ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize = 1024
   411→                buffsize = ClientSocketTool1.ReceiveBufferSize
   412→                ServerStreamTool1.Read(InStream1, 0, InStream1.Length)
   413→                Dim Returndata As String = System.Text.Encoding.Default.GetString(InStream1)
   414→                For i As Integer = 1 To Len(Returndata)
   415→                    temp1 = temp1 & "" & Chr(Asc(Mid(Returndata, i, 1)))
   416→                Next i
   417→                If Mid(temp1, 5, 4) = "0002" Then
   418→                    Tool1ConnectionStep = 2
   419→                ElseIf temp1.Contains("0061001") Then
   420→                    ToolData = CDbl(Mid(temp1, 141, 4) & "." & Mid(temp1, 145, 2))
   421→                    If Mid(temp1, 108, 1) = "1" Then
   422→                        ToolDecision = "OK"
   423→                    Else
   424→                        ToolDecision = "NG"
   425→                    End If
   426→                    RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0062" & "001" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
   427→
   428→                    If wStep = 6 And srcSAB_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Then
   429→                        If srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text <> "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
   430→                            srcSAB_TQ1.Text = CStr(ToolData)
   431→                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
   432→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
   433→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
   434→                                DingDOng()
   435→                            Else
   436→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NG"
   437→                                srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   438→                                NG()
   439→                            End If
   440→                        ElseIf srcSAB_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK" And srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text <> "OK" Then
   441→                            srcSAB_TQ2.Text = CStr(ToolData)
   442→                            If ToolData >= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX And ToolDecision = "OK" Then
   443→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
   444→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
   445→                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.Text = "OK"
   446→                                srcSAB_TQ_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue

   448→                            Else
   449→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NG"
   450→                                srcSAB_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
   451→                                NG()
   452→                            End If
   453→                        End If
   454→
   455→                    End If
   456→
   457→                End If
   458→                temp1 = ""

  1152→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

  1154→        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
  1155→        Dim i As Integer

  1162→                i = i + 1

  1166→            End If
